mainCharacter.name: Sun Wukong
mainCharacter.role: Mythic inspiration for the Destined One
mainCharacter.backstory: Born from a stone that absorbed the vital energy of heaven and earth, Sun Wukong studies under Patriarch Subodhi, masters supernatural skills, and becomes one of the most famous figures in Chinese mythology.
mainCharacter.combatStyle: Fast staff combat supported by transformations, spells, and myth-inspired techniques.

supportCharacters.name: White Dragon Horse
supportCharacters.background: Originally Ao Lie, the third prince of the West Sea Dragon King, he is transformed into a horse and accompanies the pilgrimage westward.

supportCharacters.name: Red Boy
supportCharacters.background: The son of the Bull Demon King and Princess Iron Fan, trained in fire magic and known for the True Fire of Samadhi.

supportCharacters.name: Six-Eared Macaque
supportCharacters.background: A being remarkably similar to the Monkey King, with powers that mirror Wukong's own.

gameFeatures.worldSetting: A mythic fantasy world built from Journey to the West and Chinese religious imagination.
gameFeatures.combatSystem: A transformation-driven action system with demanding encounters.
gameFeatures.progression: Skill trees unlock new combat techniques and transformation forms.
gameFeatures.exploration: Explorable maps include side quests, secrets, and hidden story fragments.
gameFeatures.graphics: Unreal Engine 5 supports high-fidelity rendering and real-time lighting effects.
